positive: Minimalist geometric pattern of stylized woodland creatures (foxes, deer, owls) interacting in a dreamy forest clearing. The style is contemporary Scandinavian illustration meets Art Deco poster design. Focus on clean, bold black outlines and limited color palette of muted forest greens, earthy terracotta, and deep navy blue. The composition should be highly centered, designed to wrap around a garment, emphasizing negative space. Lighting is soft, diffused daylight, giving the image an ethereal glow. High contrast between the solid silhouettes and the background. Vector art quality, printable surface design, perfect repeat pattern capability.
negative: blurry, low detail, watermark, logo, text, graffiti, artifacts, messy, bad anatomy, out of frame, noisy, photorealistic, messy lines, multiple subjects, ugly
